query:
Description:
A red car is parked in front of a building. A person is standing next to the car.
answer:
Layer 1: <ref>person</ref><box>[[610, 330, 705, 790]]</box> <pred>standing next to</pred><box>[[610, 330, 705, 790]]</box><box>[[160, 420, 640, 805]]</box>.

Layer 2: <ref>red car</ref><box>[[160, 420, 640, 805]]</box> <pred>parked in front of</pred><box>[[160, 420, 640, 805]]</box><box>[[40, 80, 960, 620]]</box>.

Layer 3: <ref>building</ref><box>[[40, 80, 960, 620]]</box>.

1. Question: Which is closer to the camera, the <ref>person</ref><box>[[610, 330, 705, 790]]</box> or the <ref>building</ref><box>[[40, 80, 960, 620]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>person</ref><box>[[610, 330, 705, 790]]</box> is closer.

2. Question: Which appears wider, the <ref>red car</ref><box>[[160, 420, 640, 805]]</box> or the <ref>person</ref><box>[[610, 330, 705, 790]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>red car</ref><box>[[160, 420, 640, 805]]</box> appears wider.

3. Question: Which is farther from the camera, the <ref>red car</ref><box>[[160, 420, 640, 805]]</box> or the <ref>building</ref><box>[[40, 80, 960, 620]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>building</ref><box>[[40, 80, 960, 620]]</box> is farther.

4. Question: Which is positioned more to the right, the <ref>person</ref><box>[[610, 330, 705, 790]]</box> or the <ref>red car</ref><box>[[160, 420, 640, 805]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>person</ref><box>[[610, 330, 705, 790]]</box> is more to the right.

query:
Description:
A dog is lying on a sofa. A small table is in front of the sofa, and a lamp is beside it.
answer:
Layer 1: <ref>small table</ref><box>[[330, 600, 620, 820]]</box> <pred>in front of</pred><box>[[330, 600, 620, 820]]</box><box>[[120, 360, 780, 760]]</box> <ref>sofa</ref><box>[[120, 360, 780, 760]]</box>.  
Layer 2: <ref>dog</ref><box>[[250, 420, 650, 650]]</box> <pred>lying on</pred><box>[[250, 420, 650, 650]]</box><box>[[120, 360, 780, 760]]</box> <ref>sofa</ref><box>[[120, 360, 780, 760]]</box>.  
Layer 3: <ref>lamp</ref><box>[[760, 260, 900, 700]]</box> <pred>beside</pred><box>[[760, 260, 900, 700]]</box><box>[[330, 600, 620, 820]]</box> <ref>small table</ref><box>[[330, 600, 620, 820]]</box>.

1. Question: Which is closer to the camera, the <ref>small table</ref><box>[[330, 600, 620, 820]]</box> or the <ref>dog</ref><box>[[250, 420, 650, 650]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>small table</ref><box>[[330, 600, 620, 820]]</box>.  
2. Question: Which appears larger, the <ref>sofa</ref><box>[[120, 360, 780, 760]]</box> or the <ref>small table</ref><box>[[330, 600, 620, 820]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>sofa</ref><box>[[120, 360, 780, 760]]</box>.  
3. Question: Which is farther to the right, the <ref>lamp</ref><box>[[760, 260, 900, 700]]</box> or the <ref>dog</ref><box>[[250, 420, 650, 650]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>lamp</ref><box>[[760, 260, 900, 700]]</box>.  
4. Question: Which reaches higher in the scene, the <ref>lamp</ref><box>[[760, 260, 900, 700]]</box> or the <ref>sofa</ref><box>[[120, 360, 780, 760]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>lamp</ref><box>[[760, 260, 900, 700]]</box>.
